backend_tests.details: Unit tests for authentication, tokens, calendar CRUD, timezone filters, settings, JWT token expiration claim, and endpoint rate limiting pass successfully.

supabase_tests.details: RLS policies added for tables (users, events, email_hashes, notification_tokens, user_settings). Isolation verification simulated in backend/supabase/rls_test.sql transaction test script.

extension_tests.details: Chrome Extension unit tests verifying OWA DOM scraping fallbacks, SHA-256 fingerprint hashing, translation dictionary keys, retry queue limits, and URL validation pass successfully.

outlook_real_tests.reason: Missing authorized student test credentials and MFA validation permissions.
outlook_real_tests.details: Chrome Extension content scripts and local cache logic are unit-tested and fully prepared for OWA integration.

android_tests.details: Android Gradle JVM unit tests pass successfully when executed from an ASCII-only classpath (C:\Miyad_frontend). APK compiles and packages cleanly.

e2e_tests.details: Validated local FastAPI endpoints with mock payloads simulating scraping metadata -> Hash check -> Event create -> Android sync retrieval.

security_tests.details: JWT token session expiration and API rate limits are active. Supabase schemas updated with production RLS policies. Android release builds restrict cleartext traffic via Network Security Config.

blocked_items.reason: No live Supabase project credentials (SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY) provided in workspace environment.
Missing OPENROUTER_API_KEY environment variable in staging/production scope.
